title: Ripe 3D Food
description: This resource pack adds 3D food to minecraft!
body:
# Description
  Ripe 3D Food is a resource pack that adds 3D food to minecraft. I was inspired by such resources as Actually 3D Stuff, Weskerson's 3D Food and Action and Stuff.

So far, only food and a sparkling watermelon and bowl have been added, without potions, bottles, etc. But in the future, I may add some other items, as well as food from the Create mod.

# Dependencies and recommendations
  If you are using any rosource pack for 3D items, then Ripe 3D Food should be higher in the resource sets.
  
  ![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ff29fe280b75724fabab83d7b0e1d4acf4068a.webp)
  

# Thanks
  Many thanks to Arch1vways (Actually 3D Stuff) for the help with shaders, and I also relied on its folder structure when creating the resource pack.
